testcase.name: test_login_admin
test_listings

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'id': '9eb4151c-d066-4fd2-9103-9db307415ce0', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Steen', ...}, {'id': '5fe3f17c-568e-469c-a2b6-54be5422dfb3', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Metaal', ...}, {'id': 'd882ea74-cb4a-414d-b82e-490a69a37a87', 'isRecurrent': True, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '0fe97631-3107-40b2-acfd-9f86e08fffc2', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '5818f129-750e-437e-bbad-9d8a7846412d', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': 'ae33e6f0-015d-42bd-a149-569058e496e7', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, ...], 'limit': 20, 'skip': 0, 'total': 20}, list) + where {'items': [{'id': '9eb4151c-d066-4fd2-9103-9db307415ce0', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Steen', ...}, {'id': '5fe3f17c-568e-469c-a2b6-54be5422dfb3', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Metaal', ...}, {'id': 'd882ea74-cb4a-414d-b82e-490a69a37a87', 'isRecurrent': True, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '0fe97631-3107-40b2-acfd-9f86e08fffc2', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '5818f129-750e-437e-bbad-9d8a7846412d', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': 'ae33e6f0-015d-42bd-a149-569058e496e7', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, ...], 'limit': 20, 'skip': 0, 'total': 20} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: tests/test_contact_newsletter.py:145: in test_listings assert isinstance(r.json(), list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'items': [{'id': '9eb4151c-d066-4fd2-9103-9db307415ce0', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Steen', ...}, {'id': '5fe3f17c-568e-469c-a2b6-54be5422dfb3', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Metaal', ...}, {'id': 'd882ea74-cb4a-414d-b82e-490a69a37a87', 'isRecurrent': True, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '0fe97631-3107-40b2-acfd-9f86e08fffc2', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '5818f129-750e-437e-bbad-9d8a7846412d', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': 'ae33e6f0-015d-42bd-a149-569058e496e7', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, ...], 'limit': 20, 'skip': 0, 'total': 20}, list) E + where {'items': [{'id': '9eb4151c-d066-4fd2-9103-9db307415ce0', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Steen', ...}, {'id': '5fe3f17c-568e-469c-a2b6-54be5422dfb3', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Metaal', ...}, {'id': 'd882ea74-cb4a-414d-b82e-490a69a37a87', 'isRecurrent': True, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '0fe97631-3107-40b2-acfd-9f86e08fffc2', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': '5818f129-750e-437e-bbad-9d8a7846412d', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, {'id': 'ae33e6f0-015d-42bd-a149-569058e496e7', 'isRecurrent': False, 'limited': True, 'material': 'Hout', ...}, ...], 'limit': 20, 'skip': 0, 'total': 20} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
